generate-topic.title: Topic Keyword
generate-topic.body: Enter a specific topic keyword or phrase. More specific topics produce higher quality articles.
generate-topic.example: best CRM software for small businesses 2026

generate-language.title: Language
generate-language.body: Choose the article language. Auto-detect uses the language of your topic keyword.
generate-language.options: Arabic, English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Turkish, Japanese, Korean

generate-framework.title: Framework
generate-framework.body: Choose the output format. Auto-detect analyzes your project to pick the right format.
generate-framework.options: Next.js (.tsx), Vue (.vue), Svelte (+page.svelte), WordPress (PHP), Plain HTML

api-key-create.title: Create API Key
api-key-create.body: API keys authenticate CMS plugins. Copy the key immediately — it's only shown once. Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

quality-score.title: Quality Score
quality-score.body: Articles are scored across 7 signals: E-E-A-T, completeness, voice match, AI detection, freshness, technical SEO, and readability. Score of 70%+ is passing.

edit-section.title: Edit Section
edit-section.body: Describe the change you want in plain language. ChainIQ rewrites only this section while preserving the rest of the article.
